title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI for chatting with Ollama models, browsing logs, and switching personas.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit to chat with your documents.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; async, reactive, and Spring Boot starters available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; slash commands & thread support.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module wrapping the Ollama JS client; decorators for chat, embed, and model CRUD endpoints.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API for chatting with Ollama models; includes admin panel and rate-limiting.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed requests, streaming, and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes, Q&A, and brainstorming.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 or GCP instances with Ollama server pre-installed.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async HTTP bindings and typed structs for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bot (Bolt.js) that brings Ollama models into channels with thread context and file ingestion.

title: ollama-macos-swiftui
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI menu-bar app for chatting with Ollama models, drag-and-drop files, and markdown preview.
